title: A pilot reported a round silver UFO following his plane near Pará de Minas-MG [1990]
excerpt: MARCH 6th, 1990. Time: 15:33. Duration: 30 minutes. text_preview: MARCH 6th, 1990. Time: 15:33. Duration: 30 minutes. An aircraft pilot reported the sighting of an unidentified flying object with a circular shape, “approximately the size of a Learjet”, silver in color and flying at “.7 Mach speed”. According to the reporting pilot, there were 5 people with him on the aircraft when they saw the UFO near the region of Pará de Minas-MG, at about 60 NM [nautical miles], at an altitude of 70,000ft and position 5E – NW”. The sighting was done with the naked eye and with good visibility conditions. Complementary data from COMDABRA [Brazilian Aerospace Defense Comma
summary: A pilot and 5 crew observed a silver circular UFO the size of a Learjet following their aircraft from Pará de Minas to near Brasília at 70,000ft on March 6, 1990.
